recommendations.title: Beast
recommendations.overview: A recently widowed man and his two teenage daughters travel to a game reserve in South Africa. However, their journey of healing soon turns into a fight for survival when a bloodthirsty lion starts to stalk them.

recommendations.title: Strange Darling
recommendations.overview: Nothing is what it seems when a twisted one-night stand spirals into a serial killer’s vicious murder spree.

recommendations.title: Love on Safari
recommendations.overview: An American web designer inherits an animal reserve in South Africa. A no-nonsense ranger takes her on a safari in hopes that she will fall in love with the land, the animals and him.

recommendations.title: Hush
recommendations.overview: A deaf woman is stalked by a psychotic killer in her secluded home.

recommendations.title: The Pool
recommendations.overview: International students at an elite Prague school are stalked and murdered by a masked killer while holding a party in an abandoned water park.

recommendations.title: Beneath the Darkness
recommendations.overview: After watching their best friend get murdered, a group of teens struggle to expose a local hero as the vicious killer and keep from becoming his next victims.

recommendations.title: Mia and the White Lion
recommendations.overview: A young girl from London moves to Africa with her parents where she befriends a lion cub.

recommendations.title: The Initiation
recommendations.overview: An amnesiac sorority member who has been plagued by a recurring nightmare is stalked alongside other coeds by a killer in a deserted department store where they are completing a hazing ritual.

recommendations.title: The Silencing
recommendations.overview: A reformed hunter becomes involved in a deadly game of cat and mouse when he and the local sheriff set out to track a vicious killer who may have kidnapped his daughter years ago.

recommendations.title: They/Them
recommendations.overview: Campers at an LGBTQ+ conversion camp endure unsettling psychological techniques while the campsite is stalked by a mysterious killer.
